programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Smoke is the soul of barbecue. In this episode, you'll learn how to smoke duck breasts. Cherry salsa underscores duck's affinity for fruit. Vegetarians and meat eaters will devour our cheese and bean-stuffed poblanos and smoked mushroom bread pudding. But if it's carnivores you're feeding, smoke a hefty awe-inspiring beef shoulder clod. A tangy mustard barbecue sauce makes the perfect complement. (S3 E06)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: In this "surf and turf" show, a marine biologist brings ocean-fresh sea urchins for Steven to grill. Local spiny lobster is split and roasted in the shell directly on the embers. Meanwhile, Alaskan king crab gets grilled and served with garlicky absinthe butter. Representing turf are bone-in veal chops blasted with rosemary smoke and beef plate ribs, spit-roasted on a wood-burning rotisserie. (S3 E07)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show goes whole hog! Up first, pastrami bacon made by brine-curing pork belly, rubbing it with a pastrami rub, and finally slow-smoking it over hardwood. Then an apple cider-based brine and rum-spiked finishing glaze pork chops. Next, "pork and beans" like you've never seen them. Finally, rings of sweet onions are doused with hot sauce, spiraled with bacon, and crisped over the fire. (S3 E08)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show celebrates the holy BBQ trinity of barbecue: pork ribs, brisket, and pulled pork. America's favorite ribs—baby backs—are glazed with an unexpected ingredient. Beef brisket and baked beans star in crispy grilled tostadas. An amazing BBQ Titans' brisket with espresso in the barbecue sauce. Finally, pulled pork marinated in an umami-rich Korean chili paste called gochujang. (S3 E09)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Its bright but complex flavors and affinity for smoke and fire have fueled the obsession with Mexican food and drink north of the border. Tomatoes, onions, and chiles are roasted in the coals to make an unforgettable salsa. Quesadillas conceal a perfectly cooked egg. Then, a Grilled Nopalitos Corn Salad and chipotle-marinated pork tenderloin. To finish, pineapple slices flambéed with mezcal. (S3 E10)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show highlights the conviviality of a South American cookout. The secrets to recreate the pollo served in Peruvian enclaves will be revealed in this episode. Little known in the U.S. is choripan, a kind of Andean hot dog. Finally, Brazilian churrasco is made of spit-roast picanha (top sirloin cap), chicken thighs, kielbasa, peppers, and onions—all served with a Brazilian country-style salsa. (S3 E11)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Victory will be yours! Start the party with chicken legs smoke-roasted over maple wood, then glazed with a fiery fusion of maple syrup and sriracha. A quartet of grilled and smoked beans appears in a colorful side dish. Next up, a trio of internationally-inspired burgers: inside-out American-style burgers Greek-style spiced lamb burgers and kaffir lime-scented Thai veal burgers. (S3 E12)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Steven takes a field trip to the famed Hitching Post II in Buellton, California, where owner Frank Ostini demonstrates the ultimate Santa Maria barbecue. Back on the set, Santa Barbara fisherwoman Stephanie Munz shares her secret for grilled whelks (sea snails). The celebration continues as we meet some of the production crew and go behind the scenes of Project Smoke. (S3 E13)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Smoke is the soul of barbecue. In this episode, learn to use an electric smoker, offset smoker, and upright barrel smoker to make delicious smoked treats. On the menu: cold smoked scallops with smoked tomatoes and jicama mango salsa smoke-roasted chicken with horseradish dip and pecan-smoked baby back ribs with prickly pear barbecue sauce. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: In this episode, learn how to make luscious barbecued Berkshire pork belly house-cured pastrami and Kentucky-style barbecued lamb shoulder with an unusual black barbecue sauce called "dip". Plus, check out a new take on a classic cocktail–a smoked Manhattan! (S1 E02)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: It's surf and turf on Project Smoke! Learn to use smoke to jazz up this classic combo with smoked shrimp cocktail fired up with chipotle chiles and a Yucatan orange cocktail sauce fresh bacon-wrapped, lemon-and-dill-stuffed trout smoked on cedar planks Santa Maria tri-tip reverse-seared on a pellet grill and Chinese tea-smoked duck served taco style. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Get an inside look at the tools and fuels you need to get creative with ribs! Learn to make gigantic, grass-fed, barbecued beef ribs Jamaican jerk spareribs from heritage breed Berkshire hogs smoked over exotic pimento wood and spice-smoked Colorado lamb ribs with cherry barbecue sauce. Plus delectably different sides: apple-enriched, hickory-smoked coleslaw and bacon-cheddar cheese cornbread. (S1 E04)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show is for people who want to smoke, but don't have access to a conventional wood- or charcoal-burning smoker. Learn how to use unconventional methods indoors to smoke a wide variety of ingredients from eggplant to salmon. Plus, how to smoke authentic Jamaican jerk chicken using your gas grill. (S1 E05)

programme.desc: Lifeguards respond to a woman with a suspected heart attack on Campbell Parade. Jethro treats a female backpacker experiencing anaphylaxis with an EpiPen. Jesse and Jethro compete: surfer vs. bodyboarder. A severe dislocated shoulder necessitates the use of two green whistles.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Trainee lifeguard and Bra Boy member Jesse fractures his spine when dumped by a huge wave. Jake rescues a beginner surfer being smashed against cliffs. programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Tijuana Surprise
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent. And, with Matt and Froy's business in a complete shambles, they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana.

programme.title: Rolling Away
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill and onto the flatbed. And later, Matt and Froy head out on a repo for a BMW, but when the camera guy refuses to leave the car and Matt's lunch starts to get to him, things go terribly wrong in what could be the worst repo in the history of EGA Recovery.

programme.title: Sting Operation Blues
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou find themselves in the middle of nowhere in a tooth-and-nail fight with a trio of nerdy stargazers, Froy and Sonia find a cooperative old man to be a hassle after agreeing to let him get his stuff out of his cluttered car, and Lou and Matt go on a repo to interrupt a shady car sale and find themselves caught in the middle of an elaborate police sting operation.

programme.title: Boys with Toys
programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Suspicious Packages
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy repo a hummer from a bachelorette who is down to party, but when the cops arrive it's the repo team who is in for a shock.

programme.title: Look What You Did!
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get locked in the battle of a lifetime with a pair of young debtors who are understandably upset that their late model Tahoe has found its way to the bottom of a lake. Is it Froy's fault, as they claim, or are there other forces at work here? Then, Lou and Matt get down and dirty with a taser-packing P.I. who isn't ready to say goodbye to his ride. Finally, when Frankie puts the go-jacks on the wrong car, it plucks Matt's last nerve and places him at risk for the beat-down of the century.

programme.title: Instruction and Destruction
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Now Serving Mrs. Pizarro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold, but have to put discussion on hold while they repo repo a hovercraft golf cart from a snooty golfer. Next, Sonia and Ronnie's easy day at the salon gets disastrous when the should-be debtor serves Sonia with a lawsuit. And finally, Froy and Carlos head out to a worksite to repo the bulldozer that Carlos should have been training for.

programme.title: A Blow to the Head
programme.desc: When Froy is seriously injured on a routine repo, the building confrontation between Lou and Matt continues to escalate.

programme.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: T-Bone Trouble
programme.desc: The team's work with anger management starts to pay off - with disastrous consequences. Matt and Sonia get into a standoff with a wealthy divorcee, his daughter and her raging boyfriend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

Drew's Mega Makeover Crew is comprised of celebrity hair stylist Chris Appleton, founder of Harlem's Fashion Row Brandice Daniel, Co-founder of Milk Makeup Zanna Roberts Rassi and Instagram sensation The Young Emperors. Plus, “The Neighborhood” star Max Greenfield joins in on the fun.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's Cookbook Release Party with Chef Pilar Valdes, The Download: Alex Cooper
programme.desc: Drew and Chef Pilar Valdes celebrate the official release of their cookbook, “Rebel Homemaker,” by sharing three tasty recipes including Shredded Beef with Pickled Red Onions, Pairs with Everything Salad and Ode To Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup. Then, Drew is joined by “Call Her Daddy” podcast host Alex Cooper for the latest edition of The Download. Plus, Pop Quiz Week continues, where every day one in-studio audience member will play for a chance win time in a money booth filled with $10,000.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Katy Perry, Drew's News, In A Minute Selma Blair Sneak Peak
programme.desc: Drew takes the show on the road to join Katy Perry on-site at her Las Vegas residency, PLAY. Then, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Drew shares a sneak peak of her upcoming interview with Selma Blair.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Ralph Macchio, Drew's News with Dennis Rodman

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Relationship Red Flags with Martha Stewart, Drew's News with Josh Wolf, Drew Gooder

Comedian Josh Wolf joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover everything from the latest trend inspired by Ted Lasso, the new parenting trend of sittervising and more! Plus, in an all-new Drew Gooder, Drew is surprising a very deserving nurse.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's Crew To The Rescue Hour
programme.desc: Drew's Crew to the Rescue Hour: Drew's assembled her Drew's Crew team of experts to help solve viewers' dilemmas on everything from fashion to food to relationships and remodeling. Celebrity Interior Designer Mikel Welch is surprising one deserving viewer who lost her home office in Hurricane Ida with a brand-new workspace. Then, hair stylist extraordinaire Chris Appleton helps one mother of three spruce up her look before heading back to the office. Plus, renowned dating coach Damona Hoffman is on-site to help one couple reignite their marriage after recently becoming empty nesters, and “Rebel Homemaker” co-author Pilar Valdes is whipping up a yummy and healthy dish to help curb those carb cravings.

programme.desc: At 7.30am on a mild, summer morning, a middle-aged woman goes into her backyard to unlock the self-contained unit where her 23-year-old daughter lives alone. She lets her daughter's dog out and notices a pair of overalls lying on the floor, half-in, half-out of the bedroom. The overalls should be with her daughter who, by now, would normally be on her way to work at a recycling facility. The woman takes a closer look and finds her daughter's body lying face-down on the bedroom floor, cold. She calls out to her husband, they phone emergency services and the operator tells them to roll over their daughter - her throat hasbeen cut.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.sub-title: Irrawaddy Delta: The Magical World of Mangroves
programme.desc: The Irrawaddy Delta in southern Myanmar is home to the most diverse mangrove forests in the world. The forests serve as natural protection against cyclones that regularly strike the region. The Irrawaddy's widely branching tributaries not only provide schools of fish and rich nutrients, but also function as the most important transport route for the people living in the delta. The greengrocer couple U Tin Hlaing and Daw Khin Lay supply the villages downstream with their fresh produce. But they do not go any further than the Meinmahla Kyun Wildlife Sanctuary. From that point on, the river becomes increasingly turbulent, too dangerous for their small, flat boat. The sanctuary is home to a variety of animal species including the rare Irrawaddy dolphins, saltwater crocodiles, birds of prey such as black kites and brahminy kites, migratory birds such as spoon-billed sandpipers, woodcocks, great cormorants and various anatids. Ranger Lha Soe Win and his colleagues regularly patrol the nature reserve to monitor the animal population and make sure the mangroves are no longer illegally logged for firewood. Since the 1970s, the mangrove population has declined by more than 60 percent, with dramatic consequences for the inhabitants of the delta. Cyclone Nargis, the most devastating cyclone to date, claimed the lives of around 130,000 Burmese in 2008. Together with scientists from the conservation charity Flora and Fauna International, the rangers are working on reforesting the mangroves to restore their function as a natural barrier in the future.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: The journey leads through one of the most fascinating delta landscapes in the world. Starting in the untouched jungle of the Tumucumaque in the north of the Amazon delta, the journey continues south by boat across the 30 kilometre wide river to the Ilha de Maraj. The largest river island in the world, as large as Switzerland, is surrounded by wide beaches, mangrove forests and floodplain forests. On the island untouched jungle and wet savannah characterise the land. Fishermen and aai farmers live from the fruits of nature on the edge of the numerous river veins and flood plains and the collection of medicinal plants serves here, far away from civilization, as a living for the people. On the south side of the delta in the city of Belem we explore the exotic world of the famous Ver-o-Peso market with its impressive variety of fish, tropical fruits, spices and medicinal herbs.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and three side-kicks head straight into the “Bearcage”, looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones that Texas and Oklahoma can throw at them. They find it – and their stormchasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Space
programme.desc: We break the bounds of earth, and look at the environment of space. We examine the difficulties and challenges of exploring this most challenging environment.↵ ↵George experiences some of the extreme training needed for space travel –aboard a Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, the Zero-G plane, and a centrifuge producing 6 G's of force, and witnesses the launch of a flight to the International Space Station.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Under Pressure
programme.desc: It's dark, it's cold, there is no air to breath and everything is under extreme pressure. George begins his exploration of the deep with a well-preserved shipwreck in the st.lawrence River, then heads west to dive with undersea explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuyyton, and investigate the newly discovered “Black Smoker” deepsea vents. The show climaxes in Curacao, where we dive to 1000 feet aboard Nuyyton's newest submersible.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Crystal Cave
programme.desc: In 2000, a remarkable find was made in Chihuahua, Mexico, of a spectacular cave filled with giant crystals, some over 20 meters long. But it is a intensely difficult spot to explore – with temperatures over 50 degrees C and humidity well over 100%. George leads an Explorers Club Flag Expedition into the cave, wearing special refrigerated suits and respirators to battle the extreme environment.

programme.title: Angry Planet | 2009 Hurricane
programme.desc: The “Angry Planet” team will be tracking storms through the 2009 Hurricane season, and plan to film george as he heads into a big one.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Turkmenistan
programme.desc: The “Angry Planet” team hopes to film the natural wonders and extreme phenomena of this fascinating Central Asian country, including a spectacularly burning crater of natural gas, underground lakes, sandstorms and remnants of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Tornadoes
programme.desc: Ground Zero for host/adventurer George Kourounis‚ stormchasing is Oklahoma City, capital of North America's ´Tornado Alley´. programme.title: Angry Planet | Desert Monsoon
programme.desc: Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the American Southwest during the Desert Monsoon. He ups the danger factor by traveling with wild atheist shock-jock R.J. Evans to track massive lightning storms which can produce bolts of up to one hundred million volts. The pair come close - too close - to dangerous electrical clouds swirling over Tucson, Sedona and Monument Valley.

programme.title: Angry Planet | African Hellhole
programme.desc: The Angry Planet team heads to Africa to climb the steep and very active Nyiragongo Volcano in the Congo that erupted in 2002, sending 125,000 people fleeing for their lives. Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the bubbling lake of molten lava and investigates the risk the dangerous volcano poses to both the people of city of Goma and the Mountain Gorillas who live on the nearby jungle slopes.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 2
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy the dazzling world of coral reefs in 4K you embark on a journey through some of the most vibrant underwater reefs on our blue planet - including many scenes which no longer look like this due to coral bleaching. From the cinematographer: "The footage for this film was shot over a period of some years in French Polynesia, Micronesia, Indonesia and East Timor. Unfortunately there are not that vibrant anymore today. Coral reefs have suffered from the rise of water temperature, rise in acidity, destructive fishing methods and severe storms caused by climate change." - Peter Schneider. "Rainbow Reef Relaxation" is a 3-hour long, sweeping yet majestic & vibrant underwater journey to the world's most beautiful lagoons, as captured by Nature Relaxation collaborator Peter Schneider (Underwatercam) paired with ambient underwater sounds and brand new ambient music by the Cynic Project. Filmed in High Definition several years ago, thanks to its age this film offers magical glimpses of an underwater world that is bursting with life, color, and beauty.

programme.title: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Stumble upon the picturesque beauty of Hawaii's Pa'ako Cove, famous for its white sand beach and lava outcroppings.

programme.title: Sunny Getaways
programme.desc: Take a stroll on the boardwalk to the turquoise waters, in Le Gosier, Guadeloupe.

programme.title: A Day in Mt Rainier 2
programme.desc: Spend 2 hours slowly journeying to some of the most beautiful and hidden sections of the famous Mount Rainier National Park, in Washington state with nothing but the pure nature sounds for total relaxation.

programme.title: Healing Hawaii: Kauai
programme.desc: Prepare your senses for the ultimate visual & audio journey around the exotic island paradise of Kauai, known as the Garden Isle. Immerse yourself in 60 different one-minute scenes of pure nature bliss, slowly transitioning from one to the next.

programme.title: Camping on the mountain
programme.desc: Journey to the Canadian wilderness and take in the soaring views of unspoiled nature.

programme.title: Holiday Cheer: Seasons Greetings
programme.desc: Holiday Cheer: Seasons Greetings E2 — Immerse yourself in a realm where the magic of the holidays materializes through vibrant brushstrokes and captivating photography. The music breathes new life into the sound of Christmas with groovy rhythms grounded by drum kits and funky basslines.

programme.title: Featured Artist: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E1: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos — Explore Andrew Soria's mesmerizing digital photo collages in “Cityscape Mementos.” His unique artistic vision offers a fresh perspective on urban architecture and culture, inviting viewers to rediscover their own cities in a new light.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E3: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt — A fusion of the diverse artistic styles & visions of our featured artists. Erni Vales unleashes imagination with surreal creations that transport you to another world while Sam Heydt challenges perspectives with thought-provoking conceptual art.

programme.title: New Year Cheer III
programme.desc: New Year Cheer S1E3 — Celebrate the dawn of a sparkling New Year with elegant strokes of white, silver, and gold. The artwork create a harmonious symphony of sophistication and hope, radiating a sense of renewal and opulence.

programme.title: Happy Hour: Fashion Edge
programme.desc: Fashion Edge E1 — Step into a realm of electrifying fashion and avant-garde creativity with this high-energy collection. Unleashing the boundless imagination with cutting-edge art that redefines fashion's limits and leaves an indelible mark on the world of style.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Women Artists Now E1 — An extraordinary collection amplifying the global brilliance of women creators. showcasing the vibrant and diverse perspectives of women artists worldwide. Each piece reflects the power, innovation, and beauty of women shaping the art landscape.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Black Artists Now E1 — Discover a captivating art collection honoring the richness and diversity of black culture, inviting audiences to embrace diversity and appreciate the extraordinary creativity of artists around the world.
